scripts.dev:app: concurrently -n web,market-data,market-maker,liquidation -c green,cyan,magenta,yellow -k "npm run dev --workspace=web" "npm start --workspace=@tradynance/market-data" "npm start --workspace=@tradynance/market-maker" "npm start --workspace=@tradynance/liquidation-engine"
scripts.typecheck: tsc -p web/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p packages/core/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p services/chain-watcher/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p services/market-data/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p services/market-maker/tsconfig.json --noEmit && tsc -p services/liquidation-engine/tsconfig.json --noEmit
